title: Aranet Weekly Occupancy Pattern from CO2 Peaks
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-30d
| eval co2=tonumber(coalesce(co2_ppm, ""))
| eval dow=strftime(_time,"%w")
| bin _time span=1d
| stats max(co2) as daily_peak by _time location
| stats avg(daily_peak) as typical_peak by location dow
description: CO2 daily peaks trace occupancy rhythms; useful for cleaning schedules and hybrid desk planning.
value: Reduces energy and cleaning spend aligned to real use.
implementation: (1) Exclude outdoor transfer grilles. (2) Share anonymized dashboards with workplace team.
visualization: Heatmap dow × hour; line typical peak.
grandmaExplanation: We study weekly air patterns to see when buildings are actually busy.
